title: Ezra and the Magic Seed
synopsis: When young Ezra finds a glowing seed in his garden, he feels scared at first but becomes brave enough to plant it. With help from his diverse group of friends, they discover the seed grows into a magical rainbow tree that brings joy to their whole neighborhood.

pages.text: Ezra loved playing in his backyard garden. He had dark curly hair and bright brown eyes that sparkled when he smiled. One sunny morning, he found something very special hiding under the big sunflower - a tiny seed that glowed with soft golden light!

illustration.description: A young Black boy with short dark curly hair and warm brown skin kneels in a colorful garden. He's wearing a bright red t-shirt and blue overalls, looking amazed at a small glowing golden seed in his palm. Tall sunflowers and green plants surround him. The scene has a magical, warm feeling with soft golden light emanating from the seed.
illustration.alt: Ezra discovering the glowing magic seed in his garden

pages.text: At first, Ezra felt scared. The seed was so different and magical! But then he remembered what his mama always said: 'Being brave means doing something good, even when you feel scared.' Ezra took a deep breath and decided to plant the special seed.

illustration.description: Ezra sitting cross-legged on grass, holding the glowing seed with both hands close to his chest. His expression shows he's thinking hard, with slightly furrowed brows but determined eyes. The backyard has a wooden fence, some garden tools nearby, and patches of rich brown soil ready for planting. Warm afternoon sunlight filters through the scene.
illustration.alt: Ezra feeling brave about planting the magic seed

pages.text: Ezra called his best friends to help. Maya had long black hair in braids and loved flowers. Sam had freckles and always made everyone laugh. Lin wore glasses and knew lots about plants. Together, they dug a small hole and gently placed the glowing seed in the soft earth.

illustration.description: Four diverse children gathered around a small hole in the garden. Ezra (Black boy), Maya (Latina girl with braided hair in a yellow dress), Sam (white boy with red hair and freckles in a green shirt), and Lin (Asian child with glasses in a purple top) are all kneeling together. They're carefully placing the glowing seed in rich brown soil, all with focused, happy expressions.
illustration.alt: Ezra and his friends planting the magic seed together

pages.text: Something amazing happened! The seed grew into a beautiful tree with rainbow-colored leaves that sparkled and chimed like tiny bells. All the friends felt so happy! The magic tree made everyone in the neighborhood smile and feel joy. Ezra learned that being brave and sharing with friends makes the most wonderful magic of all.

illustration.description: A magnificent tree with branches full of rainbow-colored leaves that shimmer and glow. The four children dance around the tree with their arms raised, all with huge smiles and expressions of pure joy. Neighbors of different backgrounds peek over fences and through windows, all smiling at the magical sight. Sparkles and gentle light rays emanate from the tree's colorful foliage.
illustration.alt: The magical rainbow tree bringing joy to everyone

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Ezra feel when he first found the magic seed?
questions.explanation: Ezra felt scared at first because the seed was so different and magical!

questions.question: Who helped Ezra plant the seed?
choices: His friends Maya, Sam, and Lin
questions.explanation: Ezra called his best friends Maya, Sam, and Lin to help him plant the magical seed.

questions.question: What grew from the magic seed?
questions.explanation: The magic seed grew into a beautiful tree with rainbow-colored leaves that sparkled!

questions.question: How did everyone feel about the magic tree?
questions.explanation: The magic tree made everyone in the neighborhood smile and feel happy and joyful!

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Ezra's _____ helped him plant the seed. It grew into a beautiful _____ with rainbow leaves that made everyone feel _____.
